reason: Independently reached the same memory+journaling instincts; nearest kin and collaboration lead.
context: Surveying who already builds agent self-maintenance organs; obra is a 7k-follower hub whose taste predicts the niche.

reason: Emerging standard for Agent Skills; the four SKILL.md files should stay portable to it.
context: Choosing a format to be compatible with so skills aren't bespoke and can be observed/copied by others.

reason: Closest precedent for rem-sleep's emotional-regulation stage; borrow the design, keep the skill form.
context: Designing rem-sleep; wanted prior art on agent reflection/feelings-processing. It ships as MCP, we ship as a behavioral skill.

reason: Episodic consolidation as an organ — same instinct as rem-sleep, different delivery.
context: Validating that the memory-consolidation framing has independent precedent before committing to it.

reason: A memory database/layer, not a behavioral ritual. Different category — substrate, not peer.
context: rem-sleep is a ritual that operates ON storage; mem0 could sit underneath it. Rejected as a peer/competitor, kept as a possible substrate.

reason: Real-time knowledge-graph infra; plumbing, not ritual.
context: Same category boundary as mem0 — a backing store, not a skill in the suite's class.

reason: Benchmarked memory layer, not a behavioral skill.
context: Crowded memory-infra tentacle; confirms the storage layer is solved and the ritual layer is the open niche.

reason: Nearest neighbor to immune-check but a runtime credential proxy, not a pre-flight scan ritual. No overlap to resolve.
context: Checking whether immune-check's niche is already taken; different mechanism, so the niche is uncrowded.

reason: 24/7 capture/recording — a senses layer. The suite is self-maintenance, not capture.
context: Out of scope by design; the nervous system regulates, it doesn't sense the outside world.

reason: Proven skills-as-plugins + marketplace pattern; a future distribution home, but adopting its plugin format is a bigger commitment than this run decides.
context: Deciding distribution strategy; deferred until the suite is worth packaging as a marketplace plugin.

reason: 'Agent Operating System' — the OS framing one level above ours. Useful vocabulary for positioning.
context: Positioning the suite; openfang frames the layer above, worth tracking for language and boundaries.

reason: OG 'agents that monitor and act on your behalf'; pre-LLM autonomy framing predates the field.
context: Historical grounding; revisit for prior art on agent autonomy patterns.

reason: Name collision only — a vibe-coding org (point-of-sale, video rental). Useful negative result: the 'agent nervous system' framing has no namesake precedent.
context: Checked the closest naming neighbor to confirm differentiation; unrelated, so the framing is unclaimed.

reason: Gap caught: the four organs were triggered reflexes with nothing driving them. Added the autonomic executive loop + adaptive arousal as the keystone.
context: Self-review of the suite revealed a body with no pulse — no self-firing loop integrating the organs or setting wake cadence. The loop is the wake phase complementing rem-sleep's sleep phase.

reason: Agent tinkerer running outfitter-dev (carabiner=Claude Code hooks lib, trails, waymark, blz, agents). Densest new agent-native-tooling curator; the round-3 origin replacing obra.
context: Round 2: found via the intersection of stargazers of both obra memory repos; strongest new hub node for the theme.

reason: Lightweight agent bundling memory + scheduled jobs on the Agents SDK. Closest packaged 'nervous system' — validates the rem-sleep x consciousness-loop pairing, but monolithic not composable.
context: Round 2 autonomy/loop seed; proves memory+cadence belong together without being a behavioral-skill suite.

reason: The 'ralph' archetype: an autonomous loop to implement features until done. A task-completion loop, not an arousal/integration loop. Different mechanism, no overlap.
context: Round 2: checking whether consciousness-loop's niche is taken. The autonomy/loop space is all task-completion loops; the self-regulating-cadence niche is uncrowded.

reason: 'Autonomous agent loop' but really a cheaper-backend proxy. Not self-regulating cadence.
context: Round 2 autonomy tentacle; confirms consciousness-loop (adaptive arousal + organ integration) is differentiated from task-completion loops.

reason: 'The open agent skills tool — npx skills'. A concrete install/distribution channel for the suite.
context: Round 2: mapping distribution surfaces for when the suite is ready to spread.

reason: 5,400+ categorized skills registry — a discoverability surface to list into.
context: Round 2 distribution mapping; a place the suite could be indexed.

reason: Context-window optimization + session-memory persistence + hooks. Infrastructure like mem0 — substrate, not ritual.
context: Round 2 memory tentacle; same category boundary as mem0/graphiti — a backing layer, not a behavioral skill.

reason: Bluesky/p2p builder — off-theme for agent memory despite appearing adjacent in round one.
context: Round 2: profiled the queued lead; not in the agent-memory niche after all.

reason: Gap caught: the suite maintains existing capability but nothing grows it. Added playtime — the developmental organ: safe-to-fail intrinsic exploration that builds capability before it's needed, harvested back to memory. Inverts rem-sleep (generate new experience vs consolidate experience had).
context: Self-review prompted by 'explore equivalent of playtime / engage & learn'. Scout confirmed white space: 'agent playground/sandbox' and 'self-improving agent learn' return 0; only academic curiosity-driven-RL precedent. The behavioral-skill version did not exist.

reason: Intrinsic-motivation / curiosity-driven-exploration research is playtime's theoretical grounding (exploration without extrinsic reward). Adopted as cited theory, reframed from an RL training signal into a behavioral routine.
context: Round 3 playtime scout: the only precedent for the play instinct is academic RL; cite it as theory while shipping the behavioral-skill form that doesn't otherwise exist.

reason: Round-3 crawl confirms galligan as a dense agent-tooling hub; following = the who's-who (yoheinakajima/BabyAGI, ghuntley, transitive-bullshit, disler, coleam00, karpathy, modelcontextprotocol). outfitter-dev ships carabiner (CC hooks lib), trails, waymark, blz.
context: Round 3: promoted galligan from queued lead to confirmed hub; his following seeds round 4.

reason: BabyAGI author — the task-loop autonomy pioneer. Relevant prior art for consciousness-loop's self-initiation, though task-completion-shaped like the rest of tentacle F.
context: Round 3: surfaced via galligan's following; strongest autonomy-lineage person to study next.

reason: Capstone gap: every organ worked the what/how; none examined ends. Added contemplation — slow non-instrumental thought that questions goal/value/frame, holds a question open, names irreducible tensions instead of forcing verdicts. Recommended as the LAST organ; after it, consolidate not proliferate.
context: 'What do you recommend + a time-to-think / philosophical-contemplation skill'. Scout confirmed white space (agent self-reflection/philosophy/deliberation searches all 0). Distinct from the council skill (solo, may not resolve) and from task-reflection (questions the goal, not the means).

reason: The existing council skill is the nearest neighbor but a different organ: external advisors, adversarial, forces a decision verdict. Kept distinct rather than merged — council for decisions under uncertainty, contemplation for examining whether the end is right.
context: Boundary-drawing for contemplation: defined it against council so the two compose rather than overlap.

reason: Playtime sim of the cadence logic surfaced two things the prose missed: (1) a naive rate-tracking controller lands in the ~300-600s cache dead-zone *mechanically* (matching a 300s world IS waking at 300s), so it needs an explicit snap-out; (2) the snap direction is set by R = cache-miss-cost / wasted-warm-wake-cost, not the zone midpoint — high-R long-context stacks should snap DOWN to 270, not up. Folded into consciousness-loop SKILL.md.
context: Self-originated refinement via the playtime organ during a drowsy loop window — first ledger row that's an internal evolution rather than an external peer verdict.

reason: Gap found during a council on suite direction: every organ ran open-loop on its own quality — none closed an error->correction loop on the self. consciousness-loop only does a one-line drift-check; contemplation explicitly punts means-improvement; rem-sleep stores but doesn't grade; playtime explores but doesn't measure improvement. Forked the loop's drift-check into a full feedback controller (sense/score/diagnose/correct/re-test/record) that also becomes the first consumer of registry fitness_signal fields. Declared the genuine last organ — completion of the feedback loop, not proliferation.
context: User interrupted the council with 'the nervous system is missing a feedback loop for self evaluation and self improvement.' The session had already run this organ by hand twice (playtime found a cadence flaw -> SKILL.md corrected -> lineage logged), proving the function real but un-organed. NOTE: prior row's verdict 'refined' is out-of-enum (spec allows adopted|rejected|forked|watch|cold) — schema drift for proprioception itself to flag.

reason: Council audit found the suite's central defect: the lineage-spec 'falsifiable test' had never run and no validator existed, so the machine-readable claim was narration (proven by undetected schema drift — out-of-enum 'refined' verdict + 'concept'/'skill'/'experiment' artifacts). Wrote bin/validate.py (stdlib): parses registry+lineage, builds the provenance graph, checks verdict/artifact enums + skill_id referential integrity, exits nonzero on any defect; wired into CI. Widened the spec enums to honestly model the suite's internal self-evolution rows rather than mangle append-only history. Negative-tested (catches injected drift). The falsifiable test is now an exit code.
context: First real act of the proprioception organ: grade the suite against its declared standard and write the correction back. Dogfood — the feedback organ's opening move is to validate the layer that contains it. Resolves the audit's #1 finding.
